scope_notes: Level 01 Ceiling Plan at 1:100 scale

Multiple ceiling assembly types indicated: XC1 (Existing), C1 (Gypsum Wall Board), C2 (Suspended 2x4 ACT1 Acoustic Ceiling Tile, NRC 0.7), C3 (Suspended 3x4 ACT2 Acoustic Ceiling Tile, NRC 0.7), C4 (Acoustic Wood Slat Panel System, NRC 0.7), C5 (Rated Ceiling, 1hr FRR), C6 (Suspended Acoustic Ceiling Lid with 2x4 ACT1, NRC 0.7), C7 (Suspended Gypsum Wall Board Ceiling)
Ceiling heights noted throughout plan with prefix '+' values (e.g., +3550, +3960, +2400, +2325)
Electrical Rooms ceiling to be rated: 1HR FRR noted
Ceiling in Janitor Room to be rated: 40 Min FRR noted
Patch and repair existing ceiling as required noted on west side
Align edge of ceiling to existing storefront wall noted
Bulkhead wall transition between different ceiling heights noted

RCP Legend includes: Ceiling Mounted Troffer Light, Suspended Linear Light, Recessed Linear Light, Recessed Pot Light, Feature Pendant Light, Reception Feature Light, Cove Light, Return/Exhaust Air Grille, Supply/Outdoor Air Duct, Sensor, Room Temperature Sensor
Rooms identified include: Program Room, Meeting Rooms, Kids, Bank Processing, Branch Head Office, Mezzanine WC, Electrical Vault, Stacks, Adult Lounge, Electrical room
C4+1500 notation indicating ceiling level offset in main area
Second floor beam above notation referenced
All exposed louvres, diffusers, grilles and access panels to be primed and painted per Consultant's selection (General Note)
cross_references: Mechanical drawings (See also Mechanical + Electrical drawings)
SLC WHZ System-A referenced for C5 rated ceiling

scope_notes: Five building sections all at 1:100 scale
Section 1: East-West Section Through Mezzanine - shows mezzanine level, main floor, scope of work boundary, structural elements
Section 2: North-South Section Through Public Area - shows arched roof truss structure, mezzanine, adult lounge, program room, neighbouring buildings on both sides
Section 3: North-South Section Through Children's and Stacks - shows arched roof truss, mezzanine, service desk, stacks area, children's area, neighbouring buildings

Section 4: East-West Section Through Main Entrance - shows program room, kids area, book processing, mezzanine level, new RTU (See Mech), all roof penetrations and curbs to be completed to HCABC standards, structural upgrade scope only noted

Section 5: East-West Section Through Adult Collection - shows main processing, branch head office, mezzanine level, new RTU (See Mech), structural upgrade scope noted, parapet restraint detail reference
Key elevations noted: RL2.080 Main Floor, RL5.163 Mezzanine, RL5.738 US of Truss (approx)
Scope of work boundaries clearly delineated with dashed lines
Structural upgrade scope only - See Struct noted in multiple sections
New RTU - See Mech noted in sections 4 and 5
East stair NIC noted in Section 1
Neighbouring buildings shown on both sides in N-S sections
cross_references: Mechanical drawings (See Mech) for RTU locations
HCABC standards for roof penetrations and curbs

scope_notes: Door Schedule covers Main Floor and Second Floor doors

Door types identified: Type A (Solid Core Wood - Non Raised), Type B (Solid Core Wood - Fire Rated), Type C (Hollow Core Metal - Non Raised), Type D (Hollow Metal - Fire Rated), Type E (Insulated Metal Door), Type F (Glazed Interior Storefront), Type G (Double Door - Hollow Core Metal)
Door sizes predominantly 915x2135mm and 965x2135mm
FRR ratings noted: 30MIN and 45MIN for applicable doors
Hardware Groups 1 through 18 referenced
Phase Created column noted (Stage 3, Stage 5 etc.)
Acoustic rated perimeter door seals noted for several doors (Groups 3, 4, etc.)
Deadbolt with occupancy indicators noted for WC doors
Key lock and key back functions noted for various doors
Existing storefronts identified for several entry/exit doors

Room Finish Schedule covers Main Floor rooms including: Public, Meeting Rooms, Kids, Program Room, W/C, Stacks, Staff WC, Lunch Room, Janitor, Branch Head Office, Electrical, VPL Storage, Electrical Vault, Closets

Room finish legend includes: RF1/RF2 Resilient Floor (Grey/Blue), B1/B2 Rubber Base, Paint colours PT01-PT010 (White, Salmon Peach, Light Blue, Light Grey, Light Yellow, Blue Grey, Salmon, Dark Gray), TL Wall Tile, ACT1/ACT2 Acoustic Ceiling Tile (White/Blue), MI Mirror, HP2 Laminate - Grey, PLY1/PLY2 Plywood, PDO Perforated Density Overlay
Wall protection noted at various heights (925mm, 1200mm AFF, corner protection)
Plywood backing for equipment noted
Door Schedule Notes include 15 items covering compliance, hardware, acoustic, security, glazing, fire rating requirements
Hardware Notes include 7 items covering commercial grade hardware, closer requirements, locks, security systems
cross_references: VPL Guidelines for Accessible and Welcoming Spaces Version 1.1 December 2023
